name: Coconut-Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Add sugar, butter, lemon juice, and vanilla; mix well.
3. Stir in coconut and pecans; pour into pie shell.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 45-50 minutes or until set.
5. Cool completely.
6. Store in the refrigerator.
Yield: 6-8 servings.
